report_name: New 'BL4CK SP1D3R' Ransomware Uses Double Extortion Tactics

threat_actors.name: BL4CK SP1D3R operators
threat_actors.description: The operators of the BL4CK SP1D3R ransomware, who employ double extortion tactics by exfiltrating data before encryption and threatening to leak it. They target Microsoft Windows environments.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through ransomware and data leakage threats.

attack_patterns.name: File and Directory Discovery
attack_patterns.description: The BL4CK SP1D3R ransomware performs discovery scans to locate valuable files across local and network drives before encryption.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: Sensitive data is exfiltrated to attacker-controlled infrastructure before file encryption as part of the double extortion strategy.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The malware encrypts files on the victim's system and appends the .bl4ck extension to deny access to data.

attack_patterns.name: Internal Defacement
attack_patterns.description: The ransomware changes the victim's desktop wallpaper to display a warning message.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The malware deletes volume shadow copies using commands such as 'wmic.exe shadowcopy delete' to hinder system recovery efforts.

malware.name: BL4CK SP1D3R
malware.description: A ransomware family that targets Windows systems, exfiltrates data, encrypts files with a .bl4ck extension, and drops a ransom note named BL4CK_SP1D3R_README.txt.

tools.name: wmic
tools.description: Used to delete volume shadow copies with the command 'wmic.exe shadowcopy delete' to inhibit system recovery.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: Used to delete volume shadow copies with the command 'vssadmin.exe Delete Shadows /All /Quiet' to inhibit system recovery.

infrastructure.name: BL4CK SP1D3R C2 Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Attacker-controlled infrastructure used to exfiltrate stolen data before encryption.

indicators.name: BL4CK SP1D3R Ransom Note File
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: BL4CK SP1D3R Ransom Note Creation
id: 7c8b7a9d-1e2f-4b3c-8d4e-5f6a7b8c9d0e
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of the BL4CK SP1D3R ransom note file.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/news/weekly-intelligence-report-17-jul-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-18
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\BL4CK_SP1D3R_README.txt'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of the BL4CK SP1D3R ransom note file 'BL4CK_SP1D3R_README.txt'.

indicators.name: BL4CK SP1D3R Encrypted File Creation
indicators.pattern:
title: BL4CK SP1D3R Encrypted File Creation
id: 1d2e3f4b-5c6a-4b7d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with the .bl4ck extension, which is indicative of BL4CK SP1D3R ransomware activity.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/news/weekly-intelligence-report-17-jul-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-18
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: medium
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.bl4ck'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects file rename or creation events where files are given the '.bl4ck' extension, a key indicator of BL4CK SP1D3R encryption activity.

indicators.name: Ransomware Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: Ransomware Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 8a9b0c1d-2e3f-4a5b-6c7d-8e9f0a1b2c3d
status: experimental
description: Detects commands used to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware TTP to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/news/weekly-intelligence-report-17-jul-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-18
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.defense_evasion
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_wmic:
    Image|endswith: '\wmic.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'shadowcopy'
      - 'delete'
  selection_vssadmin:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'Delete'
      - 'Shadows'
  condition: 1 of them
indicators.description: Detects the use of 'wmic.exe' or 'vssadmin.exe' to delete volume shadow copies, a technique used by BL4CK SP1D3R to prevent recovery.
